heading: Inapplicability of certain requirements to catfish
label: 625 Inapplicability of certain requirements to catfish
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the requirements of sections 603, 604, 605, 610(b), and 623 of this title shall not apply to any fish described in .section 601(w)(2) of this title
